content:
Selecting the first artworks to mint on Foundation sets an artists baseline for what collectors might expect. From a back catalog of choice, what to choose?

Bohomonk

Bohomonk studies & experiments on fine-arts and editorial photography. He explores art through style frames, scars and literature.

Bohomonk selected a right hand pressed against a foggy glass pane from early 2019 for his style-framed Foundation genesis 'The Inception.' A patient five months wait gave way to a sale when 'The Inception' was acquired by @CryptoSauga on September 30th.

Since then, Bohomonk sparingly added style frames including 'The Epilogue [Prēta]' on August 8th during JPEG summer of 2021, followed by 'Mirrored' on October 3rd and 'Häzel' on November 14th.

𝔏𝔦𝔩𝔦𝔱𝔥 is his most recent work minted on November 28th. Bohomonk has shown intentionality with the speed of each artworked release totalling five spanning five months. All artworks found a desirable collectors home at a leisurely pace and 𝔏𝔦𝔩𝔦𝔱𝔥 will likely do the same.

𝔏𝔦𝔩𝔦𝔱𝔥 is subject centered, bathed in red light, a pensive stare and a retractive stance taken with forearm held up protecting body and shielding face from the attention of the lens. A beaded cross necklace and earring barely representing a barely visible symbolising hope and strength.

"The smouldering eyes.. The caress so foreign ;
Her forked tongue drove it all. ..
And she won't let go 'till my soul's stigmatised
She introduced me to her fellow demons;
Fancy ! They lived inside me ..
From the series titled ' ʂıŋ ' - an effort to paint in light, a deeper emotion, darker in its nature."

Beyond Foundation, Bohomonk has shown the same restraint in releasing five street photographs on the Tezos blockchain including 'Train of Thought.'

“ Every person has a train of thought on which they travel when they are alone. The dignity and nobility of their life, as well as their happiness depend upon the direction in which that train is going, the baggage it carries and the scenery through which it travels. “ @the_bohomonk X J.F.Newton.

Purchase Train of Thought on Hic et Nunc.

Start the bidding on 𝔏𝔦𝔩𝔦𝔱𝔥 on Foundation marketplace.
